seoTitle: Walebing vs Walkaway — Climate Risk Comparison | ClimateNest
seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Walebing and Walkaway. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Walebing and Walkaway.
heading: Walebing vs Walkaway — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Walebing, Western Australia and Walkaway, Western Australia. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Walkaway has a lower overall climate risk score (34/100) compared to Walebing (36/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Walebing or Walkaway safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Walebing has a flood risk score of 30/100, while Walkaway scores 46/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Walebing scores 51/100 for bushfire risk. Walkaway scores 55/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Walebing or Walkaway?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Walkaway has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 0.88% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
